violations.text: Soap dispenser was observed above prep sink . Soap dispenser to be removed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off. Ice was disposed of. Ice machine to be washed and sanitized before turning back on. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024
The reach-in unit was observed leaking. Unit to be repaired to fix the leak. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving under the hot hold unit have an accumulation of of rodent droppings. Shelving to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024
